testcase.name: test_lead_status_update

skipped.message: No non-converted leads available for testing

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration18_features.py:83: No non-converted leads available for testing

testcase.name: test_branch_admin_can_get_branch_users
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration18_features.py:127: in test_branch_admin_can_get_branch_users assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get branch users: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get branch users: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_branch_admin_can_create_task
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration18_features.py:145: in test_branch_admin_can_create_task assignees = [u for u in users if u.get('role') in ['Trainer', 'Front Desk Executive']] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration18_features.py:145: in <listcomp> assignees = [u for u in users if u.get('role') in ['Trainer', 'Front Desk Executive']] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_get_trainer_stats
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration18_features.py:192: in test_get_trainer_stats assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get trainer stats: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get trainer stats: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
